mapper.select: select valtext as label, valvalue as value, memo as memo from synlte.fieldcodeval where upper(codeid) = upper(#{codeId})

select value, label from(
select value, label || '(' || tableCount || ')' as label from (select case when a.value is null then '未知' else a.value end as value, case when a.label is null then b.classifyCh else a.label end as label, case when b.tableCount is null then 0 else b.tableCount end as tableCount from (select distinct CODEID as value, CODETEXT as label from V_CLASSIFY_INFO where PARCODEID = 'JZCODEGASJZZFL') a full join (select primaryorganizationch as classifyCh, count(*) as tableCount from classify_interface_all_date group by primaryorganizationch) b on a.label = b.classifyCh)
select value, label || '(' || tableCount || ')' as label from (select case when a.value is null then '未知' else a.value end as value, case when a.label is null then b.classifyCh else a.label end as label, case when b.tableCount is null then 0 else b.tableCount end as tableCount from (select distinct CODEID as value, CODETEXT as label from V_CLASSIFY_INFO where PARCODEID = 'GACODE000404') a full join (select primarydatasourcech as classifyCh, count(*) as tableCount from classify_interface_all_date group by primarydatasourcech) b on a.label = b.classifyCh)
) order by value

select.if:
select value, label || '(' || tableCount || ')' as label from (select case when a.value is null then '未知' else a.value end as value, case when a.label is null then '未知' else a.label end as label, case when b.tableCount is null then 0 else b.tableCount end as tableCount from (select distinct CODENAME as value, CODETEXT as label from V_CLASSIFY_INFO where PARCODEID = upper(#{primaryClassifyCode}) and CODENAME is not null) a left join (select SJEJFLCODENAME as codeId, count(*) as tableCount from classify_interface_all_date
primaryorganizationch = '未知'
sjyjfl = upper(#{primaryClassifySecondCode})
group by SJEJFLCODENAME) b on a.value = b.codeId) order by value

select value, label || '(' || tableCount || ')' as label from (select case when a.value is null then '未知' else a.value end as value, case when a.label is null then '未知' else a.label end as label, case when b.tableCount is null then 0 else b.tableCount end as tableCount from (select distinct CODENAME as value, CODETEXT as label from V_CLASSIFY_INFO where PARCODEID = upper(#{primaryClassifyCode}) and CODENAME is not null) a left join (select SJSJFLCODENAME as codeId, count(*) as tableCount from classify_interface_all_date
primaryorganizationch = '未知'
sjyjfl = upper(#{primaryClassifySecondCode})
group by SJSJFLCODENAME) b on a.value = b.codeId) order by value

select value, label || '(' || tableCount || ')' as label from (select case when a.value is null then '未知' else a.value end as value, case when a.label is null then '未知' else a.label end as label, case when b.tableCount is null then 0 else b.tableCount end as tableCount from (select distinct CODENAME as value, CODETEXT as label from V_CLASSIFY_INFO where upper(PARCODEID) = upper(#{primaryClassifyCode}) and CODEID is not null) a LEFT join (select SJLYEJCODENAME as codeId, count(*) as tableCount from classify_interface_all_date
primarydatasourcech = '未知'
upper(sjlyyj) = upper(#{primaryClassifySecondCode})
group by SJLYEJCODENAME) b on a.value = b.codeId) order by value

mapper.select:
select value, label || '(' || tableCount || ')' as label from (select case when a.value is null then '未知' else a.value end as value, case when a.label is null then '未知' else a.label end as label, case when b.tableCount is null then 0 else b.tableCount end as tableCount from (select distinct CODENAME as value, CODETEXT as label from V_CLASSIFY_INFO where PARCODEID = upper(#{primaryClassifyCode}) and CODENAME is not null) a left join (select SJSJFLCODENAME as codeId, count(*) as tableCount from classify_interface_all_date
primaryorganizationch = '未知'
SJEJFLCODENAME = upper(#{primaryClassifySecondCode})
group by SJSJFLCODENAME) b on a.value = b.codeId) order by value

select CODEID as codeValId, PARCODEID as codeId, CODETEXT as valText, CODEID as valValue from synlte.fieldcode where PARCODEID = 'GACODE000414' union select CODEVALID as codeValId, CODEID as codeId, VALTEXT as valText, VALVALUE as valValue from synlte.fieldcodeval where codeid in (select codeid from synlte.fieldcode where PARCODEID = 'GACODE000414')
